commands.title: Get latest copy of AI tools
Update older skill copies with latest
Update older agent copies with latest
Update older hook copies with latest
Update older instruction copies with latest
Update older plugin copies with latest
Update older prompt copies with latest

view/item/context.when: (view == AIToolsOrganizer.hooksGithub || view == AIToolsOrganizer.hooksKiro) && (viewItem == areaInstalledFolder_newest || viewItem == areaInstalledFile_newest)
(view == AIToolsOrganizer.hooksGithub || view == AIToolsOrganizer.hooksKiro) && (viewItem == areaInstalledFolder_older || viewItem == areaInstalledFile_older)

AIToolsOrganizer.skillRepositories.markdownDescription:
Repositories to fetch content from. Supports **GitHub** and **Azure DevOps** repositories. Use the **Add Repository** button in the Marketplace view to add repos from a URL.

- GitHub: `{ "owner": "...", "repo": "...", "branch": "main" }`
- Azure DevOps: `{ "owner": "org", "project": "project", "repo": "repo", "branch": "main" }`

owner.description: GitHub owner or Azure DevOps organization name

project.description: Azure DevOps project name (set this to use an Azure DevOps repository instead of GitHub)

AIToolsOrganizer.installLocations.description: Per-area default download locations. Keys: agents, hooksGithub, hooksKiro, instructions, plugins, prompts, rules, skills. An empty object uses runtime defaults on first activation (Cursor vs other hosts differ; see SkillPathService.ensureInstallLocations).

hooksGithub.description: Default download location for GitHub hooks

hooksKiro.description: Default download location for Kiro hooks

rules.description: Default download location for Cursor rules (.mdc files)

AIToolsOrganizer.githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token for higher API rate limits (optional)

AIToolsOrganizer.azureDevOpsPat.markdownDescription: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token for accessing ADO Git repositories. Requires **Code (read)** permission. Only needed when using Azure DevOps repositories in `#AIToolsOrganizer.skillRepositories#`. If empty, the extension also uses the `AZURE_DEVOPS_EXT_PAT` environment variable (e.g. set in your shell profile or CI).

AIToolsOrganizer.cacheTimeout.description: Cache timeout for marketplace data in seconds

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.install:vsix: npx vsce package && npm run install:vsix:only
scripts.install:vsix:kiro: npx vsce package && npm run install:vsix:kiro:only
scripts.reinstall:vsix: npm run uninstall:vsix && npm run install:vsix
scripts.reinstall:vsix:kiro: npm run uninstall:vsix:kiro && npm run install:vsix:kiro
scripts.reinstall:vsix:both: npx vsce package && npm run uninstall:vsix && npm run uninstall:vsix:kiro && npm run install:vsix:only && npm run install:vsix:kiro:only
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
